multiFestivalArtists.name: Slayyyter
multiFestivalArtists.signal: THREE festivals + headline tour at small venues. Nessa Barrett formula potential.

multiFestivalArtists.name: Holly Humberstone
multiFestivalArtists.signal: UK breakout, 3.6M Spotify, routing through 500-1100 cap venues. Classic undersized routing.

multiFestivalArtists.name: Jane Remover
multiFestivalArtists.signal: Hyperpop/experimental. Niche but on 2 festivals. Festival-only mostly.

multiFestivalArtists.name: Blood Orange
multiFestivalArtists.signal: Established act, Dev Hynes. Not emerging.

multiFestivalArtists.name: KATSEYE
multiFestivalArtists.signal: K-POP CRITICAL: 30M+ Spotify, NO headline dates. When tour announces = instant demand.

multiFestivalArtists.name: Flowerovlove
multiFestivalArtists.signal: UK teen pop artist on 2 festivals, no US headline dates yet. Watch for tour announcement.

multiFestivalArtists.name: WHATMORE
multiFestivalArtists.signal: Very small act on 2 festivals. Early signal.

kpopOpportunities.name: KATSEYE
kpopOpportunities.notes: 30M Spotify, girl group, HYBE-created. No headline tour = massive pent-up demand when announced. Filipino-American crossover appeal.

kpopOpportunities.name: Stray Kids
kpopOpportunities.notes: K-pop heavyweights. GovBall Saturday headliner. No standalone US dates found — arena tour likely later.

kpopOpportunities.name: BINI
kpopOpportunities.notes: Filipino pop group. Massive Filipino-American fanbase. No US dates on Bandsintown yet. Coachella only.

kpopOpportunities.name: Fujii Kaze
kpopOpportunities.notes: Japanese singer. 7.1M Spotify. No US headline dates found. Previous US tours sold out arenas. When announced = instant sellout.

kpopOpportunities.name: Creepy Nuts
kpopOpportunities.notes: Japanese hip-hop duo. 5.8M Spotify from anime tie-ins. Only 2 US headline dates (NYC + Chicago). TINY supply for massive demand.

kpopOpportunities.name: Taemin
kpopOpportunities.notes: SHINee member. No US dates found. Solo tour would be undersized.

kpopOpportunities.name: BIGBANG
kpopOpportunities.notes: Legendary K-pop group. No US dates. Reunion = arena sellouts.

nassaBarrettFormula.name: KATSEYE
nassaBarrettFormula.notes: When headline tour drops, this is the biggest opportunity on the board.

nassaBarrettFormula.name: Gigi Perez
nassaBarrettFormula.notes: 29M Spotify but playing Kia Center, Citizens Bank Park — likely support slots. When solo headline happens at 1-2K venues = explosion.

nassaBarrettFormula.name: Holly Humberstone
nassaBarrettFormula.notes: Classic mismatch. UK breakout with BRIT Rising Star. Coachella + GovBall + headline at 9:30 Club and Variety Playhouse.

nassaBarrettFormula.name: Slayyyter
nassaBarrettFormula.notes: THREE festivals. Headline at Showbox, Wonder Ballroom, Basement East. Cult hyperpop fanbase.

nassaBarrettFormula.name: Creepy Nuts
nassaBarrettFormula.notes: Japanese hip-hop. Bling-Bang-Bang-Born went mega-viral from anime. Only NYC + Chicago.

nassaBarrettFormula.name: Snow Strippers
nassaBarrettFormula.notes: 5.8M Spotify, zero headline dates. When tour drops = instant demand.

ukInternationalBreakouts.name: Holly Humberstone
ukInternationalBreakouts.signal: BRIT Rising Star winner. First proper US headline. BUY.

ukInternationalBreakouts.name: NewDad
ukInternationalBreakouts.venues: 300-600 cap (Dada Dallas, Crescent Ballroom, Empire Control Room)
ukInternationalBreakouts.signal: Irish indie rock. 21 US dates at TINY venues. First US headline tour. Growing buzz.

ukInternationalBreakouts.name: CMAT
ukInternationalBreakouts.signal: Irish country-pop. Massive 20+ US dates. Some arena routing suggests support slot.

ukInternationalBreakouts.name: Joost
ukInternationalBreakouts.signal: Eurovision viral star. First US tour at mid-size venues. Terminal 5 NYC = 3000 cap. Dutch fanbase travels.

ukInternationalBreakouts.name: Royel Otis
ukInternationalBreakouts.signal: 8M Spotify. Already sizing up to amphitheaters. Might be past the sweet spot but still growing.

ukInternationalBreakouts.name: Spacey Jane
ukInternationalBreakouts.signal: Aussie indie rock. 20 US dates. First major US headline push. MGM Music Hall Boston = ambitious.

ukInternationalBreakouts.name: COBRAH
ukInternationalBreakouts.signal: Swedish electronic/pop. Full 16-date US tour. Aggressive routing.

ukInternationalBreakouts.name: Oklou
ukInternationalBreakouts.signal: French electronic artist. 13 US dates at solid mid-size venues. Charli XCX adjacent.

ukInternationalBreakouts.name: The Beths
ukInternationalBreakouts.signal: NZ indie rock. 33 US dates is a MASSIVE tour. Dedicated fanbase.

ukInternationalBreakouts.name: Confidence Man
ukInternationalBreakouts.signal: Aussie dance-pop. Red Rocks date (Oct 16!) = demand signal.
